name: nitrogen_vent_system_16025dc5
description: Design a simple gaseous nitrogen venting system consisting of a nitrogen gas source node connected to ambient through a single orifice. The nitrogen node contains gaseous nitrogen at elevated pressure, which vents through the orifice to ambient conditions. The system must achieve steady flow through the orifice. Components: nitrogen_source (gaseous nitrogen tank/node), orifice_vent (orifice connection to ambient), ambient (ambient environment node). FIXED: ambient pressure at 101325 Pa, nitrogen source initial pressure (tunable but must be > ambient to drive flow). TUNABLE: nitrogen source initial pressure, orifice diameter/area, nitrogen source initial temperature.

notes: Nitrogen source must start at pressure above ambient to drive flow through orifice

checks.description: Nonzero mass flow occurs through the system
No nonphysical or degenerate warnings during simulation
Ambient node pressure remains at atmospheric pressure (101325 Pa +/- 100 Pa)
Ambient node pressure remains at atmospheric pressure (101325 Pa +/- 100 Pa)
Nitrogen source starts at pressure above ambient to drive venting flow
Orifice vent has positive mass flow from nitrogen source to ambient
